title: USD/IRR Free-Market (Parallel/Black-Market) Exchange Rate, Daily (2011-11-26 to 2026-07-11)

citations.source_org: Multiple (see per-row citations in data.csv); primary sources are Bahmani-Oskooee (2005, Iranian Economic Review, University of Tehran) and World Bank Report No. 22953-IRN (2001), with 2004-2011 annual anchors compiled via Wikipedia's transcription of Central Bank of Iran Annual Review 2013/14 + CIA World Factbook, and one PBS Frontline/Tehran Bureau (2012) narrative figure
